data.name: Dating Advice from the Apocalypse
data.detailed_description:
STORY

You are Rocky "Rocket" Wang, a robotics specialist for the United Citizens Marine Corps, and you have a BIG problem. You've been stranded deep in the Pacific Equatorial Exclusion Zone right in the heart of the former island nation of Lemuria. Nobody knows exactly what caused the chaos that ravaged the nation, but one thing is clear... Nobody can leave.

Lemuria's survivors have been reduced to scattered remnants and tribal factions whose very existence is marked by constant competition and cooperation for survival…in a once lavish paradise plagued by hordes of freaks, mutations, monstrous beings, and other "things" that now roam the untamed lands. And then you came along…


FEATURES

  • “Streamer Mode” to experience the story with acceptable levels of risqué content.

  • An original sci-fantasy story set in an imaginative alternate history.

  • Dialogue options that dictate how characters feel and act toward you.

  • Branching story paths with actual consequences.

  • Multiple Love Interests: Play Straight, Gay, or Bi with men, women, and everything in between.

  • Exploration: Interact with the environment and NPCs in “free roam” sections where you have full control of the main character.

  • Combat Minigames: Utilize arcade-style shooting mechanics during action and hunting sequences.

  • Detailed codex with lore entries for people interested in the game’s worldbuilding.

data.short_description: YOU'VE BEEN STRANDED!!! Your goal? Escape the mutant and zombie-infested island paradise you're stuck on. Easy! Maybe even get laid along the way?? Balance relationships with colorful characters, factions, and love interests in this sci-fi choice-driven adult Visual Novel sex-comedy romp.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10, DX11, or DX12 capable
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10, DX11, or DX12 capable
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
